title: hieracium saxatile subsp. saxatile
intro: Hieracium saxatile subsp. saxatile, also known as rock hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Rock hawkweed is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its uses and efficacy require further research and validation.
